title: I already have all the data I need from what's been pulled. Let me render a chart and wrap both the three-player breakdown and the full overview in one response.

turns.agentText:
I already have all the data I need from what's been pulled. Let me render a chart and wrap both the three-player breakdown and the full overview in one response.

All the data is in hand. Let me render the charts and deliver everything in one shot.

Here's the complete picture — the three-player breakdown first, then the full overview.

---

## Vettexl, BreakN & Sunny

**Vettexl.9726** — 227/332 all-time (68%), **13/25 recently (52%)** — trending down. Monday check: missed the first two (May 4, 11) but showed up for the last three (May 18, Jun 1, Jun 8) — **3/5 Mondays (60%)**. Most flexible player in the guild with 10 professions (Luminary, Specter, Firebrand, Druid, Troubadour, Paragon, Untamed, Conduit, Galeshot, Berserker).

**BreakN.5496** — 278/332 all-time (84%), **21/25 recently (84%)** — rock solid, no drift at all. Monday check: **4/5 (80%)**, only missed May 18. Pure Berserker across 332 raids — they have one job and they show up for it.

**Sunny.3891** — 196/332 all-time (59%), **24/25 recently (96%)** — the biggest trending-up story in the guild. Monday check: **5/5 (100%)**. Plays Amalgam, Druid, Harbinger, and Scourge.

---

## General Attendance Overview

{{figure}}

**Core raiders (15+ runs in May–Jun):** Three players hit 100% — harasho, Arx, and Oceanomega haven't missed a single raid this window. Sunny, hotep, WindNature, and Wisdom are all at 96% (one miss each). Eight players sit in the 72–84% band forming a reliable second tier.

**Monday specifically:** Mondays are well-covered by the regulars. Of the five I cross-checked, Sunny hit all five, BreakN hit four, and Vettexl hit three. The players who *don't* show up Mondays are the Saturday-night crew (Dub/bro.2856) and Kamoidra's own command nights (Thursdays).

---

## Trend comparison — profiled players

{{figure}}

The standout stories:
- **Sunny** is on a tear — jumped from 59% all-time to 96% recently. Basically hasn't missed a raid in six weeks.
- **BreakN** is a metronome — 84% all-time, 84% recently. Completely consistent.
- **Vettexl** has cooled off — 68% all-time but only 52% in the recent window.
- **Dub** is below their own baseline — 46% all-time but only 32% recently (Saturday attendance is holding but they're not picking up other nights).
- **Kamoidra** is trending up — 30% all-time but 44% recently, suggesting they've been making more of the non-command nights lately.
